key.name: count
key.description: The current counter value, persisted across restarts.

key.name: label-text
key.description: Text displayed alongside the count in the top bar.

key.name: show-label
key.description: Whether to show the label text alongside the count in the top bar.

key.name: position-right
key.description: Place the counter on the right side of the top bar instead of the left.
